name: Barracuda Networks Security API
what_it_does: Barracuda Networks REST API for email security, web security, and network protection platform. Enables AI agents to manage email security gateway configuration and quarantine management, handle threat event retrieval from email and web security, access spam quarantine and release workflows, retrieve email archiving and compliance search data, manage cloud-to-cloud backup for Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace, handle DLP policy management and violation reporting, access SIEM integration for security events, retrieve WAF (Web Application Firewall) threat event data, manage endpoint agent deployment and status, and integrate Barracuda security data with SIEM, SOAR, and compliance platforms.
use_cases: Managing email quarantine and threat events from SOC automation agents
Accessing Microsoft 365 backup data from data protection agents
Retrieving email security analytics from compliance agents
Integrating email threat data with SIEM from security operations agents
not_for: Enterprise NGFW without email security and backup integration
Advanced EDR without email and web security platform context
Consumer email security without enterprise gateway management
best_when: An enterprise or MSP using Barracuda wants AI agents to automate email quarantine management, backup monitoring, threat event processing, compliance searching, and SIEM integration.
avoid_when: SECURITY RISK: Automated email quarantine release must require validation — automated release of high-confidence spam or malware creates security incidents. Backup automation must verify backup completion before depending on recovery availability.

auth.notes: Barracuda uses product-specific API authentication. Email Security Gateway uses password parameter. Barracuda Cloud Backup uses separate API keys. Documentation via Barracuda Campus portal. No native webhooks — syslog for event streaming. Separate APIs for different products (ESG, WAF, Backup, CloudGen Firewall). MSP portal API for multi-tenant management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per user/device annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; Email Protection, Backup, WAF, and CloudGen Firewall separately priced
pricing.notes: Campbell, California. Founded 2002. Private (KKR). Email security, backup, and network security platform. 200,000+ customers globally. Strong SMB and mid-market focus. Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace backup differentiator. MSP-ready platform. Competes with Mimecast and Proofpoint for email security.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per product API; varies by product

known_agent_gotchas: Product-specific APIs — each Barracuda product (ESG, WAF, Backup, Firewall) has separate API; no unified platform API
Legacy auth patterns — older products use non-standard auth (password parameter, session cookies); modern OAuth not uniformly implemented
Documentation behind Campus portal — requires Barracuda customer login for comprehensive API documentation
No native webhooks — syslog integration for event streaming across products
No public MCP server — product-specific REST APIs via documentation portal
MSP multi-tenant — partner portal API differs from customer product APIs; verify target API for use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: Email security and backup. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. Legacy API keys. US/EU. Email threat and backup data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Email security and backup. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. Legacy API auth. US/EU. Email threat and backup data.
